id.description: Stable task identifier from the audit queue.

dispatchPhrase.description: Exact phrase the captain can send to start this single task.

goal.description: Concrete outcome expected from this one task.

readList.description: Files or docs to inspect before editing.

workList.description: Files, docs, or tests this task may edit.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Concrete pass criteria for this task.

requiredChecks.description: Commands or checks to run before marking the task done.

commitExpectation.description: Whether this task expects a commit after completion.

riskLevel.description: Risk level for the task itself.

stopIf.description: Conditions that should stop the task before editing further.

proof.description: Evidence to record when the task is complete.
